name: Yawn up a Storm!
description: Help the sleepy Snorlax wake up the town.

name: Brighten Things Up!
description: Bring light to the dark caves of Pokopia.

name: Time to Party!
description: Set up the perfect party for the Pokémon celebration.

name: Rebuild the Huge Building!
description: Help restore the abandoned building to its former glory.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 1
description: Insert items into the machine at the strange building on the coast of the Withered Wastelands.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 2
description: Continue the initiation by bringing more resources to the machine.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 3
description: Gather building materials for the machine. Fluff can be obtained around Pokémon like Swablu and Mareep. Paper is obtained from giving Pokémon with Recycle Wastepaper.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 4
description: Heavy materials needed. Bricks from giving Pokémon with Burn Solid Clay. Gold requires processing. Concrete requires processing.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 5
description: Power up the building. Electricity is needed to be connected — a Furnace provides 30, a Windmill provides 10. Tinkagears are made by giving the Tinkmaster Iron Ingots.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 6
description: Furnish the building with furniture items.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 7
description: Deliver appliances and reach max environment levels in three areas.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 8
description: Deposit a photo into the machine — any photo will do.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 9
description: Final challenge — reach max environment level in the starting area.
